calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-029 event-conditioned comparator: reef substrate (Bug 1+2 fix)
items.notes: Corrected rerun: Bug 1 BreathOscillator disabled (breath_period=0), Bug 2 _committed_step_idx saturation in non-bistable path. Both bugs now fixed in ree_core.

items.title: SD-037 broadcast override 4-arm: bistable (Bug 1 fix)
items.notes: Corrected rerun: Bug 1 BreathOscillator disabled (breath_period=0). Bug 2 does not apply (bistable path).

items.title: MECH-269 V_s entropy probe: cascade gate (Bug 1+2 + API fix)
items.notes: Corrected rerun: Bug 1 BreathOscillator disabled, Bug 2 _committed_step_idx saturation, plus agent.act() API replaced with sense()/select_action() pattern.

items.title: MECH-295 seeding-strengthening: bistable (Bug 1 fix)
items.notes: Corrected rerun: Bug 1 BreathOscillator disabled (breath_period=0). Bug 2 does not apply (bistable path). No supersedes (490e was a successor, not supersession).

items.title: SD-032b dACC reef substrate (Bug 1+2 fix)
items.notes: Corrected rerun: Bug 1 BreathOscillator disabled (breath_period=0), Bug 2 _committed_step_idx saturation in non-bistable path.

items.title: SD-049 Phase 2 reef behavioural validation (Bug 1+2 fix)
items.notes: Corrected rerun: Bug 1 BreathOscillator disabled (breath_period=0), Bug 2 _committed_step_idx saturation in non-bistable path.

items.title: SD-029 reef-unblocked comparator graduation test (Bug 1+2 fix)
